programs.title: Richo's Hungry Az Hell
programs.sub_title: Fancy Food For Not So Fancy Mates
programs.desc: Sometimes you've got mates coming over who think a cheese board is a personality. Richo shows you how to make restaurant-level showstoppers.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Australia
programs.desc: Rick Stein retraces his first steps in Sydney, reconnecting with old friends and exciting new influences to explore how the culinary landscape is evolving.

programs.title: Come Dine With Me
programs.desc: This week's competition is in Belfast, where our first host, food bank volunteer, Donna, is planning to dazzle her guests with her thrifty menu.

programs.title: Paisean Faisean
programs.desc: Stepping up to host tonight is 39 year old finance worker, Andrea who's throwing a Belfast themed evening choc full of local lingo but will her simple but effective fare be enough to win?

programs.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programs.desc: Matildas legends Elise Kellond-Knight and Lydia Williams join Adam to make some dinner saves that are destined for the highlights reel.

programs.title: The Cook And The Chef
programs.desc: After a year looking at Australian food culture Maggie and Simon share their thoughts. Maggie celebrates our love of meat with a whole roasted rump and Simon explores our multiculturalism with kingfish and soba noodle broth.
